name: Evaluate (HuggingFace Evaluation Library)

auth.notes: HF_TOKEN for private metrics/datasets; public metrics work without auth

performance.notes: Metric computation time varies; BLEURT and BERTScore are GPU-accelerated

agent_readiness.notes: Standardized NLP evaluation metrics from HuggingFace Hub. import evaluate. metric = evaluate.load('rouge'). results = metric.compute(predictions=['hello'], references=['hello world']). Metrics: accuracy, f1, precision, recall, bleu, rouge, meteor, bertscore, bleurt, exact_match, seqeval (NER), squad (QA), glue, sacrebleu. Combination: evaluator = evaluate.combine(['accuracy', 'f1']). evaluate.list_evaluation_modules() to discover. Comparison: evaluate.Evaluator for pipeline-based evaluation. Community metrics on HF Hub. metric.add_batch() for incremental computation.

gotchas: Some metrics download models on first use (BERTScore downloads BERT weights)
Metric implementations may differ subtly from original papers
HF Hub dependency means network calls for metric loading
best_when: Standardized NLP evaluation across ROUGE, BLEU, BERTScore, METEOR
HuggingFace pipeline evaluation (natural integration with transformers)
Comparing models on GLUE, SQuAD, and other benchmarks
When a single interface for diverse NLP metrics is needed
avoid_when: Domain-specific metrics not on HF Hub (implement custom)
Offline environments (Hub dependency for metric loading)
summary: HuggingFace evaluate provides unified access to NLP metrics. evaluate.load('rouge').compute(predictions=[...], references=[...]). 100+ metrics: ROUGE, BLEU, BERTScore, BLEURT, METEOR, exact_match, seqeval, SQuAD, GLUE. evaluate.combine(['accuracy', 'f1']) for multi-metric. metric.add_batch() for incremental computation. Apache-2.0. Best for standardized NLP model evaluation in HuggingFace ecosystem.
